extDesc.message: Highlight and save selected text on a page, then review it later in one place.

emptyStateTitle.message: Select text to save it here

emptyStateDescription.message: Saved highlights appear in this list so you can return to the source page later.

emptyStateStepSelect.message: Drag to select text you want to keep on a web page

emptyStateStepSave.message: Open this popup from the toolbar and choose "Save selection"

emptyStateStepReview.message: After saving, review it here and open the source page from the list

emptyStateNextAction.message: Close this popup first, then select the text you want to save on the page.

onboardingGuide.message: First-time tip: select text on the page, then press "Save selection".

noSelectionError.message: Select text on the page, then press "Save selection" again.

premiumRequired.message: You have reached the free limit ($LIMIT$ highlights). Upgrade to Premium to keep saving.

tagInputHelp.message: Optionally enter a short tag for the highlight you save.

listInteractionHint.message: Focus a highlight button and press Enter or Space to open the source page. Use the delete button to remove a highlight.
